summaries.name: iteration_0_bob_score
summaries.description: Control: rank by the existing primary-model score.

summaries.name: iteration_3_opportunity_contact
summaries.description: Trimmed logistic: opportunity, contact floor, pitcher vulnerability, and Bob score; includes non-stop booleans only.

summaries.name: iteration_4_streak_safe_ranker
summaries.description: Hand-tuned high-floor ranker: opportunity/contact/pitcher vulnerability blend with only light stop penalties.

summaries.name: iteration_5_indicator_ranker
summaries.description: Hand-tuned ranker using the strongest observed historical indicators, with no stop-valve inputs.
